settings.nvim.title: Neovim command
settings.nvim.description: The Neovim executable or frontend to use. GUI frontends should include `--` after the command, e.g. `nvim-qt --`.
settings.runInTerminal.label: Run in terminal
settings.runInTerminal.description: Whether to run the command in a terminal emulator. Should be checked when using plain text-based nvim, and unchecked when using a GUI frontend.
settings.sessionDir.label: Session file directory
settings.sessionDir.description: Location where Neovim session files are stored
settings.sessionDir.title: Select a session file directory
settings.includeInSearch.label: Include in main search
settings.includeInSearch.description: Whether to include Neovim sessions in the main launcher search results
launcher.title: Neovim sessions
launcher.loading.title: Loading...
launcher.error.title: Neovim sessions not loaded
launcher.error.description: Check your log for error messages
